title: Tax Analyst
description: Nike is seeking a Tax Analyst to support tax compliance and planning initiatives. You'll prepare tax documents, research tax positions, and ensure compliance with federal and state tax regulations. Work hybrid in Sacramento and contribute to Nike's global tax strategy.
responsibilities: Prepare and review tax returns and supporting schedules
Conduct tax research on complex compliance matters
Calculate and document tax provisions and accruals
Monitor changes in tax law and recommend policy updates
Support tax audits and provide documentation as needed

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Professional development and CPA exam support
